examples: The moving waters at their priestlike task of pure ablution round earth's human shores.
Or because ablution washes away the past?
He performed his ablution before the ritual.
His pronouncements on every subject from personal ablution to the status of Jerusalem are followed keenly by Muslims all over the world.
Half a dozen websites in English alone (like efatwa.com, muftisays.com and askimam.com) offer online advice about everything from ablution to Zionism.
